title: One Member of Iranian Soccer Squad Abandons Asylum Bid in Australia
summary_full: Seven members of the Iranian women’s soccer delegation had initially opted to stay in Australia. The reversal was a sign of how fraught that decision was.
summary_public: Seven members of the Iranian women’s soccer delegation had initially opted to stay in Australia. The reversal was a sign of how fraught that decision was.
